runParameters.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workload.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL matmul kernel; Dawn routes through Tint->MSL. Measures steady-state dispatch throughput, not compile time.
workload.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workload.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
